title: Raw Friendly Garlicky Silky Moroccan Stir-fry
description: A raw-friendly post-workout dish featuring shrimp paste in a silky Moroccan sauce with garlic and other aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: For raw-friendly version use roasted garlic

instructions: Combine water and shrimp paste in a saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sliced bamboo shoots to the boiling mixture. Cook for about 5 minutes until heated through but not fully cooked (raw-friendly).
Reduce heat to low, add diced tomatoes and crushed cardamom pods. Simmer for another 3-4 minutes.
Stir in coriander powder and cook for an additional minute or until the sauce thickens slightly.
Serve immediately as a snack with raw vegetables like carrots and celery sticks.
